text:
Created attachment 192852
dns/dnsperf: Update to 2.1.0.0

Changelog
=========

*   Update to 2.1.0.0
*   Specify LICENSE
*   Bump BUILD_DEPENDS to latest BIND
*   Register new (databases/lmdb) and missing (devel/json-c) LIB_DEPENDS
*   Add required USES (ssl) and USE_GNOME (libxml2)
*   Discard stale stat.h fix
*   Freshen COMMENT and pkg-descr
*   Pet portlint
*   Take maintainership


QA
==

portlint: OK
poudriere: OK -- testport 10.4R amd64
